# Support

GitHub Download Now is a free and open-source browser extension designed for users across Windows, Linux, macOS and Android.

## Getting help

- Use GitHub Discussions for general questions and usage help.
- Open a bug report if the extension does not work as expected.
- Use the wrong recommendation issue template when an unsuitable release asset is selected.
- Report security vulnerabilities according to the security policy.

When reporting a problem, please include:

- the GitHub repository URL;
- your operating system and CPU architecture;
- your browser and extension version;
- the asset selected by the extension;
- the asset you expected it to select.

## Supporting the project

You can help the project by:

- starring the repository;
- sharing it with people who download applications from GitHub Releases;
- testing it on different operating systems, architectures and browsers;
- reporting repositories with unusual release asset names;
- contributing code, translations, documentation or test cases.

Donation options may be added later. All extension functionality will remain free and open source.
